top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Set to Rise After Stellar Quarter: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian equities were poised to rise Wednesday after capping their best quarter in nearly 17 years, as a rally in chipmakers and signs of US economic resilience fueled optimism about corporate earnings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oaktree Capital-Backed ITG Raises $312.2 Million in US IPO
top_signals.summary: Digital infrastructure services firm ITG Inc. raised $312.2 million in a US initial public offering, pricing its shares below a marketed range.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Seeing the whole picture: Closing notes from Kazakhstan
top_signals.summary: The final Ground View Kazakhstan dispatch explores why context, not just data, shapes the real investment story.
